SpaceX reveals larger-than-expected Bitcoin holdings in IPO filing
summary: SpaceX is expected to go public next month, which would make its 18,712 Bitcoin holdings rank seventh among public companies.

title: Key Bitcoin price metric used by bulls falls to six-week low, but there’s a silver lining
summary: Profit-taking by Bitcoin traders pushed the Coinbase BTC premium to a six-week low, but demand from longer-term traders put a clear support under the range lows.

title: Samsung Reaches Tentative Deal With Union
summary: South Korean stocks rallied after Samsung Electronics Co. reached a tentative deal with its labor union, defusing the threat of an imminent strike at the world’s largest memory chipmaker. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Seeks Energy Export Boost to India as Rubio Visits Delhi
summary: The Trump administration wants to boost energy exports to India, the US ambassador in New Delhi said on Wednesday, ahead of a multi-day visit by Secretary of State Marco Rubio to the world’s most populous country.

title: Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Plots 1-for-40 Stock Split Following 99% Price Plunge
summary: Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto aims to massively reduce its share count as it seeks a price of at least $1 to regain Nasdaq compliance.
